learnings.content: When updating documentation across multiple integrated repositories, all READMEs must be updated atomically with bidirectional cross-references and consistent terminology
learnings.context: Successfully updated context-cascade, connascence, and memory-mcp READMEs with integration details

learnings.content: Integration documentation should include: architecture diagram (ASCII), component status table, key files table, and cross-references to detailed docs
learnings.context: Documentation structure that proved effective for cognitive architecture integration

learnings.content: For multi-repository git operations, use parallel Bash tool calls for independent operations (e.g., staging files in 3 repos simultaneously)
learnings.context: Could have batched git operations more efficiently using parallel tool calls

learnings.content: Use docs: prefix for documentation commits, with bullet point summaries and version numbers when applicable
learnings.context: Consistent commit message format used across three repositories

learnings.content: The /reflect skill generates reflection text but does NOT automatically store to Memory MCP - must run reflect_to_memory.py script explicitly
learnings.context: Discovered that reflection storage requires explicit script execution
